text: The sterile emptiness of the hallway stirs a faint apprehension in me—an uncanny quiet where purpose feels suspended in white walls. Moving into the colorful, information-rich space, my mind awakens with curiosity. Here knowledge and technology converge. I feel both the weight of progress and the hope that comes from human curiosity and invention. The shift from stillness to stimulation feels profound, like crossing from isolation into communal inquiry.
